markers.name: Central Spire Beacon
markers.description: Primary resonance beacon at the heart of the Black Shores. Serves as the central fast travel node connecting all sectors.

markers.name: Northern Ridge Beacon
markers.description: Elevated beacon overlooking the northern ridge. Provides access to the upper observation platforms.

markers.name: Tidal Basin Beacon
markers.description: Coastal beacon near the tidal research basin. Required for accessing underwater research zones.

markers.name: Abyssal Warden
markers.description: Elite-tier Tacet Discord entity. Drops Spectro-type ascension materials. Weekly reset. Recommended level: 70+.

markers.name: Void Sentinel
markers.description: World boss patrolling the eastern corridor. Drops resonance upgrade materials. Respawns every 3 minutes.

markers.name: Corrupted Observer
markers.description: Mini-boss guarding the southern archives. Drops echo tuning materials. Moderate difficulty.

markers.name: Shorekeeper's Origin
markers.description: Main story quest location. The site where Shorekeeper's consciousness was first initialized within the Tethys system.

markers.name: Lost Research Terminal
markers.description: Side quest trigger point. An abandoned research terminal containing fragments of pre-Lament data.

markers.name: Stellar Array Control
markers.description: Story quest location. The control centre for the Stellar Array — key to unlocking Shorekeeper's full capabilities.

markers.name: Deep Archives Entrance
markers.description: World quest trigger. Entrance to the deep archives containing classified Tethys records.
